PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)\\cloudflared", "$env:ProgramFiles\\cloudflared", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -Filter cloudflared.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -Expand FullName } })

PowerShell($cf = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\cloudflared\\cloudflared.exe"; & $cf tunnel cleanup rei-do-pitaco; & $cf tunnel delete rei-do-pitaco; & $cf tunnel create rei-do-pitaco; & $cf tunnel list)
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\cloudflared\\cloudflared.exe" tunnel route dns rei-do-pitaco api.pitaco.dpdns.org)

PowerShell(1..5 | ForEach-Object { $t = Measure-Command { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.pitaco.dpdns.org/actuator/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | Out-Null }; "req $_ via tunel: $\([math]::Round\($t.TotalMilliseconds\)\) ms" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 370; 1..3 | ForEach-Object { $t = Measure-Command { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.pitaco.dpdns.org/actuator/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90 | Out-Null }; "req $_ apos 6min idle: $\([math]::Round\($t.TotalMilliseconds\)\) ms" })

PowerShell("== RENDER \(antigo\) =="; 1..2 | ForEach-Object { $t = Measure-Command { try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://rei-do-pitaco-api.onrender.com/actuator/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120 | Out-Null } catch {} }; "health req $_ : $\([math]::Round\($t.TotalMilliseconds\)\) ms" }; "== SELF-HOST \(novo\) =="; 1..2 | ForEach-Object { $t = Measure-Command { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.pitaco.dpdns.org/actuator/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | Out-Null }; "health req $_ : $\([math]::Round\($t.TotalMilliseconds\)\) ms" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.pitaco.dpdns.org/api/auth/signin" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body \(@{ email = "diag-claude@teste.com"; password = "diagnostico123" } | ConvertTo-Json\); $h = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\($r.accessToken\)" }; foreach \($ep in @\("/api/tournaments/08bcc3dc-efaa-46f3-b9e0-0af20213d3ab/phases/31b96716-ca18-4abb-b3f8-04549191b4db/standings", "/api/tournaments/08bcc3dc-efaa-46f3-b9e0-0af20213d3ab/matches"\)\) { $t = Measure-Command { try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.pitaco.dpdns.org$ep" -Headers $h | Out-Null; $ok = "OK" } catch { $ok = $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode } }; "$ok $ep : $\([math]::Round\($t.TotalMilliseconds\)\) ms" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; docker logs reidopitaco-api 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Web Push ativado|Started ReiDoPitaco|ERROR" | Select-Object -Last 4; try { "health: " + \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.pitaco.dpdns.org/actuator/health" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30\).StatusCode } catch { "health falhou: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($c\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "porta 8080 ocupada por: PID $\($c.OwningProcess\) — $\($p.ProcessName\) \($\($p.Path\)\)" } else { "nada escutando na 8080 local" })
